template:
ulw Load the evolve skill with skill(name="evolve") and run a full configuration evolution loop. Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

You are running /evolve — a self-improvement loop for the opencode agent configuration. The evolve skill contains your full instructions. Follow them precisely:

1. Load skill: skill(name="evolve")
2. Follow the 5-phase process: Session Analysis → Pattern Classification → Scoring → Apply Changes → Log
3. Use session_list, session_read, session_search to gather data
4. Read all relevant config files before proposing changes
5. Apply only high-confidence improvements (score > 3)
6. Log everything to ~/.config/opencode/EVOLUTION_LOG.md
7. Report a summary of what changed and why

This is a ulw-loop — continue until all phases are complete and changes are applied. Do not stop early.
description: Self-improvement loop: analyses sessions and evolves AGENTS.md, rules, skills, and commands based on real usage patterns
